# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-053](task-0120): Provider Data Governance

## Purpose

Implement provider data governance.

## Scope

- Governance rules
- Compliance
- Auditing

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Ensure compliance
3. Add auditing

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Compliant
3. Audited
